framework.name: SPIFFE identity-per-replica for agents
framework.description: Current SPIFFE/Istio assigns identical identities to all pod replicas via service accounts. Posta argues agents are non-deterministic and context-dependent, so each instance needs a unique SPIFFE ID (e.g., /instance/001). SPIRE's pluggable attestation can support this, but no one does it today.
framework.raw_quote: no two replicas of an 'agent' are guaranteed to behave the same and from a compliance, security, and auditing standpoint they cannot be considered the same identities

source.title: Agent Identity and Access Management - Can SPIFFE Work?
